decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle, allowing you to quickly get a powerful 12/12 creature onto the battlefield for just one mana. The deck also includes a variety of cantrips and counterspells to help dig for the combo pieces and protect your game plan. The goal is to disrupt your opponent's strategy while efficiently assembling your own win condition.

The deck focuses on using a combination of cards to quickly get Phyrexian Dreadnought onto the battlefield, while utilizing counterspells and other spells to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It aims to control the pace of the game through card draw, countering threats, and denying the opponent resources. Stifle and other disruptive spells help to buy time for the combo to come together, while also providing flexibility in dealing with various threats. The deck thrives on precision timing and efficient use of resources to execute its win condition.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo, using cards like Stifle and Vision Charm to cheat it into play with its triggered ability. The deck also includes a lot of card draw and counterspells to control the game and protect the combo. With efficient card filtering and countermagic, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and win through the powerful Dreadnought combo.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence with creatures like Nimble Mongoose, Werebear, and Terravore, while also disrupting the opponent's mana base with cards like Armageddon and Wasteland. The deck aims to apply pressure early on with aggressive creatures and land destruction, forcing the opponent to play from behind. The inclusion of cards like Swords to Plowshares and Disenchant provide answers to threats from the opponent, while cards like Sylvan Library and Mox Diamond help with card advantage and mana acceleration. Overall, the deck is focused on aggressive land destruction strategies to overwhelm the opponent.

The main focus of the deck is to deal damage quickly and efficiently to the opponent, primarily through direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, as well as creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Mogg Fanatic. The deck also utilizes cards like Pyrostatic Pillar and Black Vise to punish opponents for playing spells or holding too many cards in hand. Ensnaring Bridge helps to control the board while Fireblast offers a powerful finishing move. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive damage output and pressure.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize enchantments to create a powerful combo that can overwhelm opponents. By ramping up mana with cards like Wild Growth and Serra?s Sanctum, the player can quickly build up their board with enchantresses like Argothian Enchantress and draw through their deck. With cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave, they can create an overwhelming board state that is difficult for the opponent to answer. The deck also includes enchantments like Seal of Cleansing and Elephant Grass for protection and control.

The main strategy of this deck is to establish control over the game by using counterspells, removal spells, and Standstill to prevent the opponent from developing their board. By controlling the game tempo and denying resources, the deck aims to grind out a win through card advantage and efficient removal. The inclusion of utility lands like Thawing Glaciers and Dust Bowl adds additional control elements to the deck, while cards like Fact or Fiction provide card advantage and flexibility. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a long game.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and disruptive spells using a combination of efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade, along with removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict. The deck aims to control the game through hand disruption with cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress, while also drawing additional cards with Phyrexian Arena and Graveborn Muse. The deck also has land destruction elements with Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, the deck is designed to apply constant pressure and disrupt the opponent's strategy.

This deck aims to rapidly advance the board state through aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. It leverages the synergy between Wild Mongrel and Basking Rootwalla to create early threats and uses Survival of the Fittest to search for key creatures. The inclusion of cards like Lightning Bolt and Grim Lavamancer allows for effective removal of opposing threats. The deck also includes some midrange threats like Deranged Hermit and Arrogant Wurm to maintain pressure on the opponent. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient aggro strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to use a combination of spells and enchantments to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a powerful combo involving Replenish. By cycling through cards with cards like Attunement and Frantic Search, and using Opalescence to turn enchantments into creatures, the deck aims to control the board and eventually win the game with a massive army of creatures. Cards like Decree of Silence and Seal of Cleansing provide additional control and disruption, while Abeyance helps protect the combo from disruption.

The main concept of this deck is to perform a combo with Ill-Gotten Gains, Brain Freeze, and Lion's Eye Diamond. The goal is to mill the opponent's deck using Brain Freeze while recurring key cards with Ill-Gotten Gains. Dark Ritual and Cabal Ritual help generate mana quickly, while cards like Lotus Petal and Gemstone Mine help with mana fixing. The deck also includes card draw and counterspells to control the game and protect the combo. Overall, the strategy revolves around assembling the combo pieces quickly and efficiently to win the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle combo to create a powerful threat on the battlefield. By using cards like Foil, Counterspell, and Daze to protect the combo, along with draw and search spells like Opt, Impulse, and Peek to find the necessary pieces, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while quickly setting up a winning board state. Additionally, cards like Chain of Vapor and Powder Keg provide additional flexibility and control options for the pilot.

This Enchantress Combo deck focuses on utilizing enchantments like Wild Growth and Enchantress's Presence to generate mana and draw cards. The key strategy is to get out Serra's Sanctum to produce large amounts of mana, then use cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the board and eventually finish the game with Replenish. The deck also includes cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing for protection and removal. The goal is to create a strong enchantment synergy that overwhelms the opponent and leads to victory.

The mono black aggro deck focuses on applying pressure early with efficient creatures like Nantuko Shade and Hypnotic Specter, while disrupting the opponent's hand with Duress and Cabal Therapy. The deck also includes removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict to clear the way for attacks. Mishra's Factory provides extra creature threats, while Wasteland helps control the opponent's mana base. The deck aims to quickly deplete the opponent's life total before they can stabilize, using its efficient creatures and disruptive spells to maintain board advantage.

The main focus of this deck is to aggressively play creatures with strong abilities, like Graveborn Muse and Knight of Stromgald, while utilizing disruption spells such as Duress and Cabal Therapy to control the opponent's hand. The deck also includes powerful cards like Wasteland and Cursed Scroll to disrupt the opponent's mana base and finish them off quickly. Overall, this Mono Black Aggro deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent and win games through a combination of creature beatdown and disruptive spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently combo off using the Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle combo. By countering or preventing opponents' spells with Counterspell, Foil, and Stifle, the deck aims to stall the game until it can assemble the combo pieces. Vision Charm, Gush, and Impulse help dig for the necessary cards, while Peek provides information about the opponent's hand. The deck also includes disruption elements like Thwart and Daze to protect the combo. Overall, the deck aims to win through a fast and powerful combo while controlling the game.
